task.summary: Evaluate the owner-approved production deployment of the static Radeq.cz /ukazky implementation to the live radeq.cz domain through Cloudflare Worker static assets.

model_or_worker.name: Codex GPT-5
model_or_worker.role: deployment operator, verifier, and governance updater

reasoning_profile.change_policy: Owner explicitly approved production deployment to radeq.cz. Allowed Cloudflare Worker and Pages deployment mutations were performed; GitHub merge/push and DNS/mail mutations were not performed.

token_efficiency_profile.context_scope: Deployment target evidence, Cloudflare Wrangler output, public URL checks, Radeq Worker adapter files, and governance mirrors.

input_packet_summary.summary: Deploy the already accepted static /ukazky implementation directly to radeq.cz, preserving the no-LLM chatbot boundary, no checkout/payment boundary, Fastmail mailbox decision, and D1 lead API behavior.

output_pointer.summary: Live production domain serves the /ukazky hub and three detail pages from Cloudflare Worker radeq.

prompt_or_input_delta.summary: The owner changed the boundary from preview/deferred production to direct production deployment on radeq.cz.
prompt_or_input_delta.rollback_path: Rollback Cloudflare Worker radeq to the previous version or redeploy the previous product build.

verification_evidence.evidence: npm.cmd run typecheck passed with 0 errors, warnings, or hints after adding worker/index.ts.
npx.cmd wrangler@latest deploy --dry-run passed and showed LEADS_DB plus ASSETS bindings.
npx.cmd wrangler@latest deploy uploaded Worker static assets and deployed Worker radeq version 747d1ab3-ff49-497b-8cb8-917c67d0153d.
https://radeq.cz/, /ukazky/, /ukazky/chatbot/, /ukazky/automatizace/, /ukazky/nabidka-eshop/, and /sitemap.xml returned 200 with expected /ukazky content.
OPTIONS https://radeq.cz/api/leads returned 204 with POST, OPTIONS; no production lead insert was submitted.
npm.cmd test passed: 9 files and 47 tests.
npm.cmd run build and DEPLOY_TARGET=github-pages npm.cmd run build both passed; existing Vite chunk-size warning remained.
npm.cmd run test:e2e passed: 15 Playwright tests.
